nodes.name: 飘带尾霸鹟
nodes.summary: 飘带尾霸鹟（Streamer-tailed tyrant，学名 Gubernetes yetapa），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。
nodes.shortSummary: 飘带尾霸鹟（学名：Gubernetes yetapa），是雀形目霸鹟科的一种鸟类，属于单型的飘带尾霸鹟属（学名：Gubernetes）。 特征 飘带尾霸鹟体重约68.4克，翼长约12.56厘米，喙宽度约9.2毫米，喙厚度约8.2毫米，嘴峰长约26.5毫米，跗蹠长约28.6毫米，…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The streamer-tailed tyrant (Gubernetes yetapa) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, and Paraguay, and as a vagrant to Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | last2=Rumboll |first2=Maurice| title =Birds of Southern South America and Antarctica | publisher =Princeton University Press | series =Princeton Illustrated Checklists | date =2001 | location =New Jersey | pages =Plate 77, map 77.14 | isbn =0-691-09035-1 }} It has also been documented as a vagrant in Uruguay.
